title: SIP ParticipantState
description: An entity's state within a specific unit.

objective.description: What the entity wants during this unit.

action.description: What the entity is trying to do.

target.description: What or whom the action is directed at.

obstacle.description: What prevents the entity from achieving the objective.

information_state.description: What the entity knows, doesn't know, and learns.

observables.description: Observable traits of this participant relevant to this unit. Profile-extensible.

structure.description: Structural properties of this participant's role in the unit (tactics, arc beat, trigger type, etc.). Profile-extensible.

interpretations.description: Interpretive claims about this participant. Profile-extensible.
